---
title: "Talks"
subtitle: "Workshops, lectures, and applied analyses presented to live audiences."
body-classes: "ed-page"
listing:
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: long
  fields: [date, title, description]
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    page-layout: article
ai-summary:
  banner-title: "Yapper Labs | AI Summary"
  model-title: "Model: ChatGPT o3-mini-high"
  model-img: "/images/openai-white-monoblossom.svg"
  summary: "Talks across applied data science and statistics — practical Quarto + GitHub Pages workflows, interactive teaching with webR, logistic regression for loan approval, survival analysis of pesticide toxicity, and handling missing data with MICE."
---
